headline: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Launches CD Prediction Clearing
summary: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (NYSE:FIS) is one of the 10 High PE Stocks Insiders Are Buying. On March 24, 2026, Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (NYSE:FIS) announced the launch of FIS CD Prediction Clearing, a solution designed to provide 24/7 post-trade clearing for regulated prediction markets. The company said the platform replaces batch-based processes […]
